title: 222 fishing trawler

The '''222 fishing trawler''' was a [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] boat built by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]].

Although it was already an old model around five hundred years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], [[Hugo Bartyn]] bought two hundred units to staff his town, [[Bartyn's Landing]], on the planet [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]. Five centuries after this, many of these trawlers were still operative.

==History==
The 222 heavy fishing trawler was a model of [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] boat developed and built by [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian Industries]]. As of around five hundred years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], it was obsolete and superseded by newer models.<ref name="BL" />

Nonetheless, entrepreneur [[Hugo Bartyn]], who wanted a fleet of fishing trawlers for his newly formed city [[Bartyn's Landing]] on [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]], bought 209 old units, at a heavy discount, from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. These trawlers became the basis of his business of seafood, [[Bartyn Gourmet Delicacies]], and many of the units survived until [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]—except of course for those having unfortunate encounters with gargantuan predators, saboteurs, etc. Those lost were eventually replaced by other models, particularly in the case of private fishermen not affiliated with Bartyn's venture.<ref name="BL" />

[[Mix Liddell]] worked in the 222 trawler ''[[Swilla]]''.<ref name="BL" /> [[Howe Walwahd]], a private fishermen, lost her boat when it was rammed by one of the 222 trawlers.<ref name="R">{{GamerCite|7|Reckonings}}</ref>

==Features==
The 170-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long trawler, with a forked bow, rested on a pair large pontoons and was propelled by [[repulsorsail]]s in early models and later [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlifts]]. Onboard processing facilities and ship decks were attended to by 300 sailors. A single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and two engineers operated the ship, and it could transport up to 800 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo. Although stock models were unarmed, the 222's slow speed and large load capacity made it a choice target for [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], prompting many owners to add defensive weaponry; Bartyn provided his units with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] cannons.<ref name="BL" />
